title: Add todo search and local persistence
summary: Added search and local persistence on branch todo/session-search-persist, later integrated into todo/working-set-editor where header copy, local state, and visibleTodos overlap with inline editing.
goal: Keep review context across reloads and help users locate a task without scanning the full list.
changesMade: Moved todo initialization to local storage-backed state
Added a search query input above the list
Filtered visible tasks by title, assignee, and priority

features.name: todo search and persistence
features.why: Longer review lists become hard to scan, and losing in-progress task state on refresh makes the demo less realistic.

decisions.decision: Persist only the todo list, not temporary UI state
decisions.why: Reloads should restore task data without freezing the user back into a stale search query or transient selection.

blockers: Merging with inline editing changes the same state declarations, header messaging, and visibleTodos wiring in App.jsx.
openQuestions: Should the search query also persist between reloads?
Should search hide rows that are currently being edited?
resumePrompt: Continue the search and persistence work. Preserve local storage-backed todo data and quick filtering when resolving conflicts on todo/working-set-editor or todo/conflict-resolution.
